brief.headline_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护持续观察中
brief.summary_zh: 当前时间窗内尚未形成足够密度的高相关信号，系统将继续监测，并在达到发布阈值后自动生成专题观察。
brief.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
brief.summary_en: There are not yet enough high-confidence signals in the current window to publish a topic brief. The system will continue monitoring and publish once the threshold is met.
